## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Docker version: [e.g., 24.0.5]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 120, Safari 17]

## Data Information

**IMPORTANT: Do NOT include any actual data or PII in this report.**

- File type: [e.g., CSV, Excel]
- Approximate number of rows: [e.g., 1000]
- Column types: [e.g., free text medical notes, structured email column]

## Error Messages

```
Paste any error messages here (remove any PII first)
```

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
